Heat ice to steam and observe latent heat absorption.

Sealed System (Closed Container) Keep steam inside to observe steam heating
Heat Loss to Surroundings Consider real-world heat exchange
Constants Reference
cice:2100
cwater:4200
lfusion (ice):3.34e5
lvapor (water):2.26e6

Phase: Ice Heating
